title: notes editor: save button hidden behind system nav bar
description: The full-screen note editor Dialog does not apply system-bar/IME insets, so the pinned save/delete action row renders behind the gesture nav bar and is unreachable. Fix by making the editor respect safe-drawing insets (decorFitsSystemWindows=false + safeDrawingPadding), mirroring how ModalBottomSheet handles insets elsewhere.
close_reason: Editor converted to a full-height ModalBottomSheet so it insets past the nav bar + keyboard (save row now reachable); added 'open in…' external-editor handoff via FileProvider ACTION_EDIT. Verified on device.

title: notes: open note in external editor (hybrid)
description: Add an 'open in...' handoff from the in-app editor that fires ACTION_EDIT on the note's .md via a FileProvider content URI, so a real markdown editor can do heavy editing. Save current edits first; graceful fallback (toast) when no editor is installed. Keeps the launcher for capture/browse/search while delegating real writing.
close_reason: Editor converted to a full-height ModalBottomSheet so it insets past the nav bar + keyboard (save row now reachable); added 'open in…' external-editor handoff via FileProvider ACTION_EDIT. Verified on device.

title: notes: full-screen note editor
description: A full-screen editor (Dialog with usePlatformDefaultWidth=false so swipes don't leak to the pager) with an editable title field (maps to filename) and a large multi-line scrollable body field, plus a pinned action row: primary 'save' (rename-aware) on the right and an armed 'delete' on the left. Opens on tapping a note or the 'new note' action; a blank new note is discarded on save.
close_reason: Implemented notes page epic: storage layer, settings picker, list+search UI, full-screen editor, pager wiring, docs. Built, tested, code-reviewed.

title: notes: wire notes page into the pager
description: Insert a NOTES page directly after the todo page in MainActivity's Home() dispatch (page index 3, before settings), bump PAGE_COUNT to 5, and confirm the page indicator dot count follows. Depends on the NotesPage composable existing.
close_reason: Implemented notes page epic: storage layer, settings picker, list+search UI, full-screen editor, pager wiring, docs. Built, tested, code-reviewed.

title: notes: list + search ui
description: NotesPage: title 'notes', a search field filtering notes by title/content (contains, case-insensitive), a scrolling list of note rows (title + a muted preview line, dot in the gutter per the motif), and NoDir/NoAccess/empty ('no notes') states like TodoPage. A pinned 'new note' action sits low in thumb reach, split from the list by a hairline. FileObserver watch + reload-on-resume + mutate/reload loop mirroring TodoPage.
close_reason: Implemented notes page epic: storage layer, settings picker, list+search UI, full-screen editor, pager wiring, docs. Built, tested, code-reviewed.

title: notes: storage layer for markdown notes
description: A Notes storage helper over the notes dir: list *.md files, read each note's title (filename without .md), body, and last-modified; save via atomic tmp+rename (mirror TodoFile.save); delete a note; unique-name handling so a new note or a rename can't clobber an existing file. Pure/file-focused so it stays testable, like common/todo.
close_reason: Implemented notes page epic: storage layer, settings picker, list+search UI, full-screen editor, pager wiring, docs. Built, tested, code-reviewed.

title: notes: notes dir setting + picker
description: Add a notes dir to Settings (KEY_NOTES_DIR, notesDir/setNotesDir mirroring todoDir) and a 'notes' section on the settings page with a folder-picker row, reusing the OpenDocumentTree picker + toFilesystemPath conversion already used for the todo dir. Reading the dir needs all-files access (already surfaced in settings).
close_reason: Implemented notes page epic: storage layer, settings picker, list+search UI, full-screen editor, pager wiring, docs. Built, tested, code-reviewed.

title: notes page (epic)
description: A notes page after the todo page. Notes are .md files in a user-chosen notes dir (mirrors the todo dir). Capabilities: list + search notes by title/content, open + edit a note in a full-screen editor, create a new note, delete a note. Follows the file-backed patterns from TodoPage (FileObserver watch, atomic tmp+rename writes, mutate/reload) and the nord/lowercase design language in design.md. Broken into subtasks below.
close_reason: Implemented notes page epic: storage layer, settings picker, list+search UI, full-screen editor, pager wiring, docs. Built, tested, code-reviewed.

title: notes: update README/docs
description: Document the notes page and the notes dir setting in launcher/README.md (and the root README if it lists pages), matching how the todo page is described.
close_reason: Implemented notes page epic: storage layer, settings picker, list+search UI, full-screen editor, pager wiring, docs. Built, tested, code-reviewed.
